title: Link
description: A lightweight paper plugin that allows players to quickly access your server's website, Discord, or other links.
body:
**A simple little plugin that allows players to access a website of YOUR choice by executing a command via chat.**
## Commands: 


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

"**/link**",
"**/linkreload**"

</details>

## Permissions:

**Both commands have permissions to disable / enabling them.**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

"**link.use**", 
"**link.reload**"

</details>

## Config.yml preview:
**The link and message that this command sends to the player can both be edited in the config.yml file.**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

```
# Link Plugin Configuration
# Set to false to disable the plugin functionality
Enable: true

# The website link that will be sent to players
Link: "https://example.com"

# The message sent to players (use LINK as placeholder for the actual link)
# Color codes supported:
# Legacy: &a (green), &c (red), &b (aqua), &e (yellow), etc.
# RGB/Hex: &#FF5733 (custom colors)

Message: "&aHi. go to:&#00BFFF LINK"
```


</details>

**Content Control!**

**Server owners have complete control over the link configured in this plugin. The plugin developer is not responsible for the content, safety, or legitimacy of any links configured by server owners!**
